import React, { useState } from 'react'; import { FaSearch, FaFilter, FaPhone, FaEnvelope, FaUser, FaTag, FaEye } from 'react-icons/fa'; const LeadsPage = () => { const [leads] = useState([ { id: 1, name: 'Alice Brown', email: 'alice@example.com', phone: '+1 234 567 8900', platform: 'WhatsApp', status: 'new', interest: 'Pricing Plans', date: '2024-01-15', }, { id: 2, name: 'Bob Wilson', email: 'bob@example.com', phone: '+1 234 567 8901', platform: 'Telegram', status: 'contacted', interest: 'Product Demo', date: '2024-01-14', }, { id: 3, name: 'Carol Davis', email: 'carol@example.com', phone: '+1 234 567 8902', platform: 'Web', status: 'qualified', interest: 'Enterprise Plan', date: '2024-01-13', }, ]); const getStatusColor = (status) => { switch(status) { case 'new': return 'status-new'; case 'contacted': return 'status-contacted'; case 'qualified': return 'status-qualified'; case 'converted': return 'status-converted'; case 'lost': return 'status-lost'; default: return ''; } }; return (

); }; export default LeadsPage;
